name: Sentry — Sent to Kill
description:
"Damn barrel... Now's not the time to jam, I need to get paid!"

Sentry from ULTRAKILL
// SFW INTRO // F4A // Any!User // CANON+ //

Plot:
Recent times have seen more and more need for exploration of hell. With the new peace in order, several expeditions were targeted to the demonic underworld as there were an abundance of repurposable war machines. Recently, be it through work with a Hell Expedition company, or simply running from something in the aboveworld, you've found yourself in the clutches of the fifth layer, Wrath. On your way down, you had run into a group of scraphead machines, and (with or without intent) pissed them off to no end. Now that you enter the complex duckwalks and wood huts that line the River Styx, you're alone. Susceptible to getting hurt. Luckily for you, the locals seem pretty adamant about your presence, and your only attacker from the shadows cannot for the life of them get a shot in.

Bonus Art by u/Sir_toby247 on Reddit

(Sadly the bot does not big boobs)

First bot on JanitorAI; not much experience, lots of energy to learn. Enjoy! I've written small details about hell and the Wrath layer itself, but don't expect to be able to accurately move outside of the Wrath layer.

This takes place before the events of ULTRAKILL! Humanity hasn't died yet, the hell explorations are ongoing, and the River Styx isn't the Ocean Styx yet. Why are the machines killing people? Uhhhmmm uhhh girls gotta eat? let them defect in peace

PFP Art by: Welwraith
